payload.summary: Planned a Kanban-style coordinator visualization webapp (MVP) at apps/kanban-viz/ as a Vite+React+TS frontend reading agent-coordinator FastAPI directly via three new endpoints (/sync-points/status, /worktrees/active, /events/work SSE). Three columns + vendor swimlanes + sync-point gate banner. Composes with the in-flight add-coordinator-task-status-renderer data contract and codeviz storage-tier + reversibility-taxonomy conventions; no FalkorDB writes in v1 (schema reserved). Hand-drafted artifacts validated and approved at Gate 1; lock-key canonicalization and parallel-package scope overlaps were the two real fixes.

decisions.title: Local web app (Vite+React+TS) as v1 frontend, not Mac-native or TUI
decisions.rationale: Works in cloud-harness sessions (a primary user), local Mac/Linux, and Tauri-wrapped native from one codebase. Approach 2 (Swift) was disqualified by cloud-harness incompatibility; Approach 3 (TUI) cannot render vendor swimlanes legibly and loses drag-to-approve. Composes with codeviz's eventual SPA on the same toolchain.

decisions.title: SSE (one-way) for live updates, not WebSocket
decisions.rationale: Live data flows server→client only. SSE reuses HTTP auth, traverses proxies, has trivial client surface (EventSource). WebSocket framing/ping-pong adds no UX value on a read-mostly board. Polling fallback engages transparently on EventSource error.

decisions.title: No JSON sidecar mirror of work_queue state
decisions.rationale: Coordinator remains the single source of truth. A mirrored docs/kanban-viz/state.json would duplicate the source and recreate the display-drift problem that add-coordinator-task-status-renderer was built to solve. Only saved views (git-committed, user-curated) and audit events (event-class, dated paths) persist to disk.

decisions.title: FalkorDB work-state schema reserved but NOT implemented in v1
decisions.rationale: Codeviz Phase 0 introduces FalkorDB; v1 of the Kanban predates it. To avoid a future rename pass we reserve node labels (WorkPackage, Agent, Vendor, Worktree, Lock, SyncPoint, AuditEvent) and edge types (CLAIMED_BY, BLOCKED_ON, LOCKS_FILE, WORKING_IN, RAN_BY, BLOCKS_SYNCPOINT, IMPLEMENTS_TASK) in docs/kanban-viz/falkordb-reservation.md. Codeviz Phase 0 ingestion adopts these without coordination overhead.

decisions.title: Codeviz operation reversibility taxonomy applied to every UI write action
decisions.rationale: read auto-allowed; reversible-write (save-view, drag-to-Ready) auto-allowed + audit; destructive-write (force-release-lock, kick-agent) requires per-action consent prompt + audit on both confirm and decline. Reversibility classifier hard-coded in v1 with a comment pointing to the codeviz reservation in skills/shared/op_reversibility.py for future convergence.

decisions.title: Tauri scaffold ships in v1; production Tauri build does NOT
decisions.rationale: cargo check verifies the scaffold compiles; CI does not build/sign/notarize a binary. Lowers follow-up cost for native distribution to ~100 lines without committing to App Store distribution prematurely. Browser code paths run without @tauri-apps/api evaluated; Tauri APIs feature-detected at runtime.

decisions.title: Saved views and audit events follow codeviz storage tier policy
decisions.rationale: Saved views → docs/kanban-viz/saved-views/<slug>.json (git, mandatory artifact header). Audit events → docs/kanban-viz/audit/<YYYY-MM-DD>/<run-id>.json (event-class, dated, mandatory header, 90-day in-tree retention per codeviz policy). No new substrate.

decisions.title: Reuse skills/shared/check_no_active_agents() for /sync-points/status endpoint
decisions.rationale: The active-agent guard already exists for /cleanup-feature, /merge-pull-requests, /update-specs sync-point skills. The new endpoint is a thin projection over the same function. Logic MUST NOT be duplicated.

next_steps: wp-contracts: author the three new endpoint contracts + saved-view + audit-event JSON schemas (Phase 1).
Verify add-coordinator-task-status-renderer's contracts/README.md is on main before pinning generated TypeScript types in wp-frontend-skeleton.
Confirm sse-starlette or equivalent SSE library choice for the coordinator endpoint at wp-coord-endpoints start.
If operator wants resource-claim pre-registration (Step 10), invoke from /implement-feature start; ttl_minutes=0 planning claims have not been registered by this plan-feature run.

relevant_files.description: Why + What Changes + Approaches + Selected Approach 1
Architecture diagram + D1-D8 decisions + storage alignment + Tauri checklist
8 phases, 68 tasks with TDD ordering and checkpoints
8 packages with non-overlapping file scopes; coordinated-tier DAG
HTTP + SSE + JSON-Schema contracts + FalkorDB reservation
